reasoning: Rippling just closed a $450 million Series G funding round at a $16.8 billion valuation on May 9, 2025. In coverage of this round, CEO Parker Conrad explicitly stated that the company is not planning an IPO in the near future and will instead use annual tender offers to provide liquidity to employees. Given that this explicit denial of IPO plans was made less than two weeks before the forecast date, and the resolution date is only 40 days away, it is virtually impossible that Rippling will reverse course and announce an IPO before July 1, 2025. I am submitting the minimum allowed probability of 0.02.
